_meta.purpose: Astrology × Crystals 6 篇交叉文章生产 config（P0 蓝海线）
_meta.cta_validation: _qc/_cta-by-slug.json（合并 tarot 32 颗已验证 + kyanite/shungite 新验证，共 34 颗；CATEGORY/SEARCH/HEALING_JEWELRY 三级降级）
_meta.module_weights_source: 框架 §2 module_weights 表（6 事件 M2/M3/M7/M8 差异化重心）
_meta.compliance: self-reflection framework; 逆行/食相/土星回归= invitation 非 doom; Gentle Note 全站统一; 去AI化硬门禁(qc关卡3 禁词=0)

mercury-retrograde.M2_focus: planetary apparent retrograde + Mercury rulership (communication/travel/tech/contracts/mental clarity) + re- prefix tradition (review/revise/reconnect/redo)
mercury-retrograde.M3_scenes: miscommunications / tech glitches & travel delays / resurfacing of past people & projects / call to finish unfinished work
mercury-retrograde.M7_psych: cognitive pacing & reflective review — pausing before reacting, double-checking details, integrating unfinished information
mercury-retrograde.M8_eastern: Vedic Budha governs buddhi (discriminative intellect), green color association; Tibetan astrology reads planetary reversals as review cycles not misfortune

saturn-return.M2_focus: ~29.5-year cycle + ages 27-30 & 58-60 + Saturn as structural audit (responsibility/long-term foundation/maturation)
saturn-return.M3_scenes: pressure to get serious on career & relationships / shedding outgrown roles / heavy responsibility mixed with clarifying purpose / long arc not instant change
saturn-return.M7_psych: identity consolidation & long-term goal commitment (Erikson intimacy-vs-isolation / generativity); building a durable adult foundation
saturn-return.M8_eastern: Vedic Shani (Saturn) = karma/time/justice, gem Blue Sapphire (Neelam) worn only after testing; Tibetan reads Saturn cycles as karmic ripening

full-moon.M2_focus: synodic ~29.5-day cycle + Sun-Moon opposition + climax & release point (what was seeded at New Moon comes to light)
full-moon.M3_scenes: heightened emotions & vivid dreams / illumination of what was hidden / natural closing point for cycles / peak energy for release & gratitude
full-moon.M7_psych: emotional processing & closure — ritualized release, naming completions, metabolizing peak emotional states
full-moon.M8_eastern: Tibetan sojong (full moon purification & vow renewal); Vedic Purnima auspicious high-energy day, Moon (Chandra) governs mind

new-moon.M2_focus: dark moon invisibility + seeding point + pairs with Full Moon as lunar rhythm (seed at new, release at full)
new-moon.M3_scenes: low energy & call to rest inward / fertile window to clarify what you want to grow / natural starting point for new habits / quiet intuition without Full Moon peak
new-moon.M7_psych: intention-setting & implementation intentions — naming specific when-where-how intentions + value of rest cycles before high-output
new-moon.M8_eastern: Vedic Amavasya (ancestor honoring & quiet reflection); Tibetan dark moon as reset point before cycle rebuilds

eclipse.M2_focus: lunar node alignment + seasonal pairs 2-4/year + accelerators of destiny (sudden turning points, course corrections)
eclipse.M3_scenes: sudden shifts in direction/circumstances / revelations reframing situations / sense of acceleration or fate-like timing / amplified emotional intensity
eclipse.M7_psych: tolerance for uncertainty & meaning-making after change — staying grounded during non-linear transitions
eclipse.M8_eastern: Vedic Rahu & Ketu (lunar nodes swallowing luminaries) as karmic windows for meditation not worldly action; Tibetan heightened stillness period

venus-retrograde.M2_focus: ~18-month cycle + ~40 days + heart-review season (love/beauty/values/money/self-worth re-examined, next Oct 3 – Nov 13 2026 Scorpio→Libra)
venus-retrograde.M3_scenes: return of past loves or relationship themes / questioning what & who you truly value / money & self-worth under review / call to revisit not initiate
venus-retrograde.M7_psych: attachment review & self-worth consolidation — examining relational patterns with curiosity, grounding worth internally
venus-retrograde.M8_eastern: Vedic Shukra (Venus) governs love/beauty/vitality, gem Diamond or White Sapphire; refined receptive energy

gentle_note: Astrology and crystal meanings draw on spiritual traditions, symbolism, and personal mindfulness practices. They are offered as a framework for self-reflection and intention-setting, not as a prediction of fixed outcomes or a substitute for professional medical, financial, or psychological advice.

faq_shared_halves.is_doom_first_half: No astrological transit — including retrogrades, eclipses, and Saturn Returns — is inherently 'bad.' These cycles are traditionally read as invitations to slow down, review, and grow, not as predictions of misfortune.
faq_shared_halves.can_predict_future_first_half: Astrology is a symbolic language used for self-reflection, not a system that predicts fixed future events. The transits surface themes and questions; your choices and actions determine what happens.
